name: Signature: Remind

description.en: Resend the signing link to a signer who hasn't responded yet.
description.de: Signing-Link erneut an einen Unterzeichner senden, der noch nicht reagiert hat.
description.fr: Renvoyer le lien de signature a un signataire qui n a pas encore repondu.
description.es: Reenviar el enlace de firma a un firmante que aun no ha respondido.
description.ro: Retrimite linkul de semnare unui semnatar care nu a raspuns inca.

bot: Resends the signing reminder to one or more signers. Ask for the request ID, signer wallet address, signer email (and optionally WhatsApp number for WhatsApp reminders), and the team slug.

inputs.name: Signer Email

description.en: Email address of the signer to remind.
description.de: E-Mail-Adresse des Unterzeichners, an den die Erinnerung gesendet wird.
description.fr: Adresse e-mail du signataire a relancer.
description.es: Correo del firmante al que enviar el recordatorio.
description.ro: Adresa de e-mail a semnatarului caruia ii trimiti reminderul.

inputs.bot: Email address of the signer who hasn't signed yet.

inputs.name: Signer Name
inputs.bot: Full name of the signer for the reminder message.

inputs.name: Signer Address

description.es: Direccion de la wallet del firmante.

inputs.bot: MultiversX wallet address (erd1...) of the signer.

inputs.name: Team Slug

description.en: Your team slug for the signing link.
description.fr: Votre identifiant d equipe pour le lien de signature.
description.es: Tu slug de equipo para el enlace de firma.
description.ro: Slug-ul echipei tale pentru linkul de semnare.

inputs.bot: Team slug used to construct the signing URL (e.g. 'my-team').
